name: multi-model-agents
description: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.4.9-lite.1: Codex remains the orchestrator; Opus/Claude provides review and scoring; Gemini tester workflow is removed; safe GitHub Release sync is included.

interface.shortDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.4.9-lite.1: Codex main control, Opus/Claude review and scoring, no Gemini tester workflow, safe release sync.
interface.longDescription: AI Agent Swarm Lite 1.4.9-lite.1 is the simplified branch of AI Agent Swarm. Codex keeps planning, authorization, real file changes, real command execution, local project memory, and final decisions. Opus/Claude acts as an external reviewer/scorer for plan-review, diff-review, test-review, and final-review, returning evidence-bound findings, risks, scores, must-fix items, and recommended Codex actions. The Gemini tester workflow is intentionally removed. This Lite release includes safe GitHub Release sync with user-level token storage support.
defaultPrompt: Use AI Agent Swarm Lite for this task: Codex remains the orchestrator and final decision maker; Opus/Claude may be used for engineering gate review and scoring.
